findings.title: Large canonical test-case file has no Artifact Write Strategy
findings.details: Large or package-based writer outputs must record the preflight write strategy before content generation so the writer does not hit Windows command-line limits or switch to compact/ad-hoc generation.
findings.recommended_action: Add `## Artifact Write Strategy` with preflight result, file-based/chunked write method, WP chunk plan, helper artifact policy and validation plan.

findings.title: Coverage Obligation Table references unknown or non-obligatory source properties
findings.details: Obligation rows must point to source_property_id values from Source Table Normalization that need obligation expansion.
findings.recommended_action: Use the exact source_property_id from Source Table Normalization or remove the row if it is not an obligation-bearing property.

findings.title: Split artifact has redundant duplicate section headings
findings.details: A split artifact must expose exactly one canonical section heading. Adjacent `# Section` and `## Section` wrappers create ambiguous section extraction and should be normalized at write time.
evidence: # Risk / Priority Map + ## Risk / Priority Map
findings.recommended_action: Keep only one canonical heading, `# Risk / Priority Map` or `## Risk / Priority Map`, before the table/body.

findings.title: Split artifact has redundant duplicate section headings
findings.details: A split artifact must expose exactly one canonical section heading. Adjacent `# Section` and `## Section` wrappers create ambiguous section extraction and should be normalized at write time.
findings.recommended_action: Keep only one canonical heading, `# Writer Self-Check` or `## Writer Self-Check`, before the table/body.

findings.title: Risk / Priority Map misses required columns
findings.details: The map must expose atom id, risk, required priority, TC/GAP links, and rationale.
evidence: missing=atom_id, gap_id, linked_test_cases, rationale, risk_factors, source_ref
columns=risk_id, package_id, linked_atom_id, risk_statement, impact, likelihood, risk_score, risk_level, required_priority, residual_risk_decision
findings.recommended_action: Add the missing columns from writer-output-format.md.

findings.title: Test-design applicability matrix misses required columns
findings.details: The matrix must expose all required columns so reviewer can audit coverage decisions.
evidence: columns=dimension, applicable, source_ref, linked_atoms, planned_tc_or_gap, rationale
findings.recommended_action: Add the missing columns from writer-output-format.md.

findings.title: Executable TDDT decisions conflict with ledger, plan, or TC links
findings.details: A standalone_tc or covered_by_existing_tc decision must stay synchronized with the same atom in Atomic Requirements Ledger, Package Test Design Plan and real TC sections. Extra or missing TC-* links create false coverage in the decision table.
evidence: TDDT-001:SRC-001.P01:ATOM-001:ledger has no covered_by_tc for executable decision
TDDT-001:SRC-001.P01:ATOM-001:planned_tc_or_gap has TC not in ledger covered_by_tc: TC-BSR32-001
TDDT-002:SRC-001.P02:ATOM-002:ledger has no covered_by_tc for executable decision
TDDT-002:SRC-001.P02:ATOM-002:planned_tc_or_gap has TC not in ledger covered_by_tc: TC-BSR32-002
TDDT-003:SRC-001.P03:ATOM-003:ledger has no covered_by_tc for executable decision
TDDT-003:SRC-001.P03:ATOM-003:planned_tc_or_gap has TC not in ledger covered_by_tc: TC-BSR32-003
TDDT-004:SRC-001.P04:ATOM-004:ledger has no covered_by_tc for executable decision
TDDT-004:SRC-001.P04:ATOM-004:planned_tc_or_gap has TC not in ledger covered_by_tc: TC-BSR32-004
findings.recommended_action: Synchronize planned_tc_or_gap with the atom's covered_by_tc, package plan row and TC sections, or reclassify the row as gap_unclear/metadata_only when no executable coverage exists.

findings.title: Test Design Review misses required review items
findings.details: The review must explicitly criticize decision-table classification, ledger/plan alignment, coverage classes, numeric length/boundary classes, conditional branches, gap specificity, internal observability, metadata-only exclusion and TC mapping atomicity.
findings.recommended_action: Add one row for each required review item before moving the writer artifact to review.

findings.title: Test Design Review uses noncanonical review items
findings.details: Extra review_item values are not part of the canonical Test Design Review contract. They may be useful as evidence, but they do not replace the required canonical items.
findings.recommended_action: Move extra checks into evidence or use only canonical review_item identifiers from test-design-review-format.md.

findings.title: No workflow-state.yaml files found
findings.details: The validator did not find any handoff state files.
findings.recommended_action: Run the validator against a repository or fixture containing workflow-state.yaml.

findings.title: Writer Quality Gate contains blocking failures
findings.details: The writer file self-identifies failed quality gates. It must not be routed to reviewer until the affected packages are rewritten or the workflow is blocked.
findings.recommended_action: Rewrite affected packages from Source Table Normalization through TC, or set workflow-state to blocked-input.

findings.title: Writer Quality Gate misses required gate items
findings.details: The gate must explicitly check artifact write strategy, mockup visual inventory, source normalization, ledger atomicity, GSR compression, plan atomicity, scenarios, TC atomicity, observability and package readiness.
findings.recommended_action: Add one row for each required gate item before moving the writer artifact to review.

findings.title: Decision log misses Decision Log section
findings.details: agent-decision-log.md must contain a `## Decision Log` table with observable intermediate decisions, not hidden chain-of-thought.
